== Lamda has been Razvisited ==
The popular level Lamda Bunker, originally made by Ragzouken, has been remade by Raziel.

'''Wiki article:''' [[Lamda Bunker (Razvisited|Lamda Bunker (Razvisited)]]/)
'''LXA forum thread:''' <http://lxalliance.net/forum/index.php?topic=9968.0>

[[Category:News]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721115321/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/News:Lamda_has_been_Razvisited -->
